title: $:/themes/wikilabs/slant-01
author: Mario Pietsch
name: Slant 01
readme:
! Overview This is an opinionated theme, used by pmario. * Compact title bar: subtitle (modifier + relative modified date) sits inline to the right of the title and wraps below when the title is long * Tiddler toolbar controls float to the top right of the title row * Clicking a tag pill opens the Tiddler Info panel and selects the //Tag Map// tab directly !! License CC-BY-NC-SA - {{$:/themes/wikilabs/slant-01/license}} ''Important:'' This theme overrides the following core templates
